inline_comments.message: All commits in this relation chain point to this Jira ticket but i can't seem to get the relation between Hound and the topic of that ticket. Could you please explain? I think it should have it's own ticket or if it's really related then a specific subtask.

> All commits in this relation chain point to this Jira ticket but i can't seem to get the relation between Hound and the topic of that ticket. Could you please explain?

Porting existing ONAP components to ServiceMesh requires deep understanding of their needs, purposes and capabilities. Code search service helps getting up to speed quickly and allows easier navigation among various repositories for both newcomers and experienced committers.

> I think it should have it's own ticket or if it's really related then a specific subtask.

I'll update Issue-IDs to https://jira.onap.org/browse/ONAPARC-540 in the next patch set push.
Ok great, please update issue-id in all commits in chain, thanks.
